## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behavior to change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] `make lint` (`go vet ./...`) passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes (especially scoring, matching,
      persistence, alias handling)
- [ ] Updated documentation (`README.md` / `README.zh-CN.md` / `CHANGELOG.md`)
      where relevant
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, ...)

## Test output

Paste the relevant `go test ./...` output, or describe how you verified the
change. Add screenshots/terminal output if CLI or TUI behavior changed.
